subject: WM-0066 review: changes_requested
body: High: recovery type filtering is applied after the global recovery-lane candidateCap, so wrong-type candidates can consume the cap and hide a later matching recovery opportunity; the no-selection reason is director_recovery_window_active despite candidateCapHit/rejectedRecoveryTypeCount. Prior duplicate-window and tick-aware active repairs are confirmed; required checks and quality pass.
